verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Know ye not, know ye not, ye are a temple Know ye not, know ye not, ye are a temple Know ye not, know ye not, ye are a temple Ye are a temple of the Holy ghost.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Yes I know, yes I know I am a temple Yes I know, yes I know I am a temple Yes I know, yes I know I am a temple I am a temple of the Holy Ghost.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Full of praise, full of power, full of glory Full of praise, full of power, full of glory Full of praise, full of power, full of glory I am a temple of the Holy Ghost.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Not by might, nor by power, But by my Spirit saith the Lord. Not by might, nor by power, But by my Spirit saith the Lord. This mountain shall be removed This mountain shall be removed This mountain shall be removed By my Spirit saith the Lord.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It's a new day It's a new day It's a new day of the Lord

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's a day of joy and gladness of victory to be won, It's a day of walking arm in arm With Jesus Christ my Lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I've a found a new way of living I've found a new life divine I have the fruit of the Spirit I am abiding Abiding in the vine.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Abiding in the vine Abiding in the vine Love, joy, health, peace He has made then mine I have prosperity Power and victory Abiding, abiding in the vine

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I will enter His gates With thanksgiving in my heart I will enter His courts with praise I will say this is the day that the Lord has made I will rejoice for He has made me glad

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: He has made me glad He has made me glad I will rejoice for He has made me glad He has made me glad He has made me glad I will rejoice for He has made me glad

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: I'm so glad Jesus set me free. . I'm so glad Jesus set me free. I'm so glad Jesus set me free. Singing Glory! Hallelujah! Jesus Set me Free

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Satan had me bound: Jesus set me free. Satan had me bound: Jesus set me free. Satan had me bound: Jesus set me free. Singing Glory! Hallelujah! Jesus set me free.

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: I' m on my way to heaven, shouting the victory I' m on my way to heaven, shouting the victory I' m on my way to heaven, shouting the victory Singing Glory! Hallelujah! Jesus Set me Free
